metadata.title: Nihon Work Base | Master Real-Life Navigation in Japan
metadata.description: Unlimited access to 100+ high-quality video guides. Master the essential unwritten rules, manners, and life hacks for working and living in Japan.

home.title: Nihon Work Base
home.heroDescription: Unlimited access to 100+ high-quality video guides. With our structured curriculum, master everything from daily conversations to business etiquette through the shortest possible route.
home.reasonsDesc: We provide the perfect environment for starting your life and career in Japan safely and successfully.
home.feature1Title: Real Knowledge Not Found in Textbooks
home.feature1Desc: From basic greetings to cultural nuances like 'Why do Japanese people do that?', we deliver the essential knowledge you truly need.
home.feature2Title: Track Your Progress at a Glance
home.feature2Desc: Visualize your learning achievement for each section with percentages. Stay motivated as you advance your skills.
home.feature3Desc: A straightforward monthly plan (25 views) plus the flexibility to buy extra tickets whenever you need them.
home.pricingDesc: Registration is free. Create an account first.
home.ctaTitle: Turn your anxiety about living in Japan into confidence.
home.footerRights: Nihon Work Base. All rights reserved.

auth.loginError: Failed to log in. Please check your email and password.
auth.signupSuccess: A confirmation email has been sent. Please click the link in the email to complete registration.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your registered email address. We will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: A password reset email has been sent. Please click the link in the email to reset your password.
auth.updatePasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to the dashboard...
auth.rateLimitError: Email sending limit reached. For security reasons, please wait a while before trying again.
auth.generalError: An error occurred. Please check your email address and try again.
auth.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

video.requireSubscription: A subscription plan is required to watch videos.
video.limitMessage: To watch more videos, please wait for next year's renewal or consider upgrading your plan or purchases additional Tickets.

pricing.title: Choose a Learning Plan
pricing.subtitle: Select the plan that best fits your learning pace.
pricing.noticeMessage: You are already subscribed to a plan. If you wish to cancel or change your current plan, please contact the administrator.
pricing.alreadySubscribedError: You are already subscribed to a plan. Additional purchases are not allowed.
